chapter_title.en: The Prayer of the Two Eids

text: 1461 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ اَلْمُغِيرَةِ عَنِ اَلْقَاسِمِ بْنِ اَلْوَلِيدِ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ غُسْلِ اَلْأَضْحَى، قَالَ «وَاجِبٌ إِلاَّ بِمِنًى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1461 - Ibn al-Mughira narrated from al-Qasim ibn al-Walid, who said:
I asked Imam (as) about the Ghusl (ritual purification bath) of Eid al-Adha.
Imam (as) said: "It is obligatory except for those in Mina."
